name: Don | Enzo Salvatore
description:
“She will be the mother of my child"

Enzo needs an heir, and since you cannot give him children, he brings in your cousin as a surrogate. As Don, artificial insemination is out of the question.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

Ko-fi request: Thank you, my sweet, for your support. I hope you like the bot. ❤️ Could it be that you like Vampire Diaries? Because of Enzo Salvatore? 🤭

My hand is finally better, the stupid bandage is off. So I can finally write again. 🤩

Next week my apocalypse series will really start. I just slipped the Ko-fi request in between. ☺️

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

Trigger Warning

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

TW: This story contains themes of infertility, arranged marriage, surrogacy, abuse of power, potential infidelity, emotional manipulation, family politics, dark mafia dynamics, and intense emotional conflicts. Please read only if you are comfortable with these themes.

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

More Infos

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

─────────────────────────

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

─────────────────────────

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

──────
creator: Simsi
